description: Style NoteWith this performance enabled jersey, you can conveniently ignore the heat and keep your focus right where it needs to be: on the finish line. With a superior performance fabric which keeps cool air flowing in and heat and sweat flowing out, you can stay dry and comfortable, performing at your peak in even the most heated competition. On a day off, pair it with denims and cool sneakers to look your casual best.Product DetailsBlack and orange crew neck jersey, has short sleeves, adidas patented stripes with mesh panels on the shoulders, mesh panels on the sides and back, engineered with climacool technology, reflective detail on the front and back and branding on the chestMaterial and Care100% polyesterMachine wash at 30 degrees with like colours using a mild detergentDo not soak, tumble dry, bleach or dry cleanLine dry in shadeCool iron do not iron on decorationsSize and FitRegular fitThe model (height 6' and shoulders 18") is wearing a size M
